findings.description: The `n:script` Nablarch custom tag is used in both JSP implementation examples in s3 (to load external JavaScript via `<n:script type="text/javascript" src="/js/common.js" />`), but it is absent from the s3 hints array. Other tags used in the same examples (`n:a`, `n:button`) are correctly included.
findings.source_evidence: Both JSP examples in the source include: `<n:script type="text/javascript" src="/js/common.js" />`

findings.description: Automated pre-check reports 7 source headings but the knowledge file contains only 6 sections (s1–s6). The provided source excerpt contains exactly 6 headings, so if the automated check is correct, a 7th heading from the full RST file may be unrepresented in this knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Automated warning S9: Section count 6 < source headings 7. Headings visible in the excerpt: (1) 複数ウィンドウを立ち上げたい場合, (2) 別ウィンドウにサブミットする場合のJSPの実装例, (3) 別ウィンドウから元画面に値を設定する場合のJSPの実装例, (4) 二重サブミットの防止, (5) 入力画面と確認画面の共通化をサポートするカスタムタグ, (6) ブラウザのキャッシュ防止.
